title: Shaded Contour
label: 07.05 Shaded Contour — PROVISIONAL
caption: Reference-only target for governed scalar shading and contour density. Exact field and aperture geometry must come from canonical SVG sources.

title: Field Grain
label: 07.08 Field Grain — PROVISIONAL
caption: Reference-only target for field-responsive microstructure. Exact topology, aperture, and singular Signal trajectory remain governed.

title: Material Response
label: 07.09 Material Response — PROVISIONAL
caption: Reference-only target for machining, coating, relief, and raking-light behavior. It is not a publishable production base.

title: One-Color Translation
label: 07.10 One-Color Translation — PROVISIONAL
caption: Reference-only target for one-ink production logic with a single Signal Lime exception. Canonical geometry remains source-controlled.
